mapper.sql: id, order_no, member_id, member_name, total_amount, freight, discount_amount, pay_amount, status, pay_type, pay_time, delivery_no, delivery_company, delivery_time, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `order` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM `order` WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_no, member_id, member_name, total_amount, freight, discount_amount, pay_amount, status, pay_type, pay_time, delivery_no, delivery_company, delivery_time, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{totalAmount}, #{freight}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{status}, #{payType}, #{payTime}, #{deliveryNo}, #{deliveryCompany}, #{deliveryTime}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET order_no=#{orderNo}, member_id=#{memberId}, member_name=#{memberName}, total_amount=#{totalAmount}, freight=#{freight}, discount_amount=#{discountAmount}, pay_amount=#{payAmount}, status=#{status}, pay_type=#{payType}, pay_time=#{payTime}, delivery_no=#{deliveryNo}, delivery_company=#{deliveryCompany}, delivery_time=#{deliveryTime}, receiver_name=#{receiverName}, receiver_phone=#{receiverPhone}, receiver_address=#{receiverAddress}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET delivery_no=#{deliveryNo}, delivery_company=#{deliveryCompany}, delivery_time=#{deliveryTime}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM `order` WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
